steps: Keep Oracle sidecar offline from AI Council.
Write signal JSON files to an approved outbox directory only after separate manual approval.
Review JSON samples locally before enabling any network path.
rollback: Stop sidecar preview process if manually started.
Remove preview-only sidecar files only after manual approval.
safety_boundary: AI Council does not execute trades or connect to broker APIs. This output is for review, risk analysis, and decision support only.
